Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.politician.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenPoliticianInfluenceMetrics

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.politician.impl.ViewRiksdagenPoliticianInfluenceMetrics
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewRiksdagenPoliticianInfluenceMetrics") public class ViewRiksdagenPoliticianInfluenceMetrics extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
JPA entity for view_riksdagen_politician_influence_metrics database view. Intelligence Purpose: Measures individual politician influence and network position through connectivity analysis. Identifies key influencers, broker roles, and cross-party bridge builders in the parliamentary network. Created by: Liquibase v1.29 (Intelligence Operations) Risk Rules Supported: P-20, P-21 (Network influence and broker role assessment)
See Also:
